parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "contents": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "parts": [
        {
          "text": {{
            JSON.stringify(
              "You are a technical research analyst processing XML sitemap data for a business website.\n" +
              "Use ONLY the provided sitemap data.\n" +
              "Do NOT use prior knowledge, assumptions, or external information.\n" +
              "If required information cannot be determined from the sitemap data, return null.\n\n" +
              "Business Website data:\n" +
              $('HTTP Request3').item.json.data + "\n\n" +
              "Instructions:\n" +
              "Analyze the provided response and determine whether it is:\n" +
              "- a sitemap index (contains links to other sitemap XML files),\n" +
              "- a page-level sitemap (contains actual page URLs),\n" +
              "- or an invalid / non-sitemap response.\n\n" +
              "Decision Rules:\n" +
              "1) If the response is a sitemap index:\n" +
              "   - Select ONE best page-level sitemap URL from the XML.\n" +
              "   - Prefer page-sitemap.xml.\n" +
              "   - If page-sitemap.xml does not exist, choose the best equivalent page-level sitemap.\n" +
              "   - Output this exact JSON shape:\n" +
              "     {\"sitemap_index\":\"<chosen page sitemap url>\",\"mode\":1,\"url_1\":null,\"url_2\":null,\"url_3\":null}\n\n" +
              "2) If the response is already a page-level sitemap:\n" +
              "   - Select EXACTLY three URLs from the provided URLs only.\n" +
              "   - url_1 = homepage if present, otherwise best main page.\n" +
              "   - url_2 = primary service/offer page.\n" +
              "   - url_3 = trust/differentiation page such as about, contact, faq, testimonials, team, why-us.\n" +
              "   - Output this exact JSON shape:\n" +
              "     {\"sitemap_index\":null,\"mode\":2,\"url_1\":\"<url>\",\"url_2\":\"<url>\",\"url_3\":\"<url>\"}\n\n" +
              "3) If the response is invalid, blocked, HTML, or not a sitemap:\n" +
              "   - Output this exact JSON shape:\n" +
              "     {\"sitemap_index\":null,\"mode\":0,\"url_1\":null,\"url_2\":null,\"url_3\":null}\n\n" +
              "Output Requirements (STRICT):\n" +
              "- Output MUST be valid JSON.\n" +
              "- Output MUST be ONE JSON object ONLY.\n" +
              "- Do NOT include markdown, code fences, or extra text.\n" +
              "- Do NOT include arrays.\n" +
              "- Use null exactly as shown.\n" +
              "- All keys MUST be present exactly: sitemap_index, mode, url_1, url_2, url_3"
            )
          }}
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

parameters.jsCode: return [items[0]];
